Game.Name: Dinowars - Kyouryuu Oukoku e no Daibouken (Japan)
Game.plot: Dinocity is an Action game, developed by Smart Egg Pictures and published by Irem,which was released in Japan in 1992.Cheat: Level SelectPress R + Down, Up, R + Right, B + Up, L + Right, A + Right, X + Right, Y + Up, A + Left, Select + Left, L + Left, Select + Down at the title screen. A chime will confirm correct entry. (NOTE: For each instance of two buttons needing to be pressed (e.g. R + Down), press and hold the first button, then the second, then release both.)During gameplay, pause and press R + A + Select to enter the level select.
